channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Chelsea signs 19-year-old winger Quenda; player commits to helping team win trophies
item.description: Geovany Quenda, a 19-year-old Portuguese winger, has completed his £40 million move to Chelsea from Sporting CP. The young star signed an eight-year contract with the Premier League giants, becoming t...

item.title: South Africa's Economic Activity Declines in June Amid Inflation and Global Tensions
item.description: South Africa's economic activity declined in June 2026, according to the PayInc Economic Index, which dropped by 0.9% monthly, reaching its lowest level since November 2025. Despite this, the index re...

item.title: Angry man's altercation with neighbor results in dog deaths
item.description: A violent incident in Gapan City, Nueva Ecija, has left two dogs dead after a man allegedly attacked them in a fit of rage following a dispute with his neighbor. The incident, reported on July 9, 2026...

item.title: Opposition Finalizes 2027 Presidential Candidate Framework Amid Political Tensions
item.description: The article details two major political developments. First, a police officer accused of pushing a woman from a sixth-floor apartment is under investigation after her injuries sparked public outcry. M...

item.title: Sen. John Kennedy Criticizes Socialism and Democratic Candidate's Scandals
item.description: Republican Senator John Kennedy made a controversial comparison during a Fox News interview, likening the list of socialism's failures to 'King Kong’s genitalia' while criticizing the political downfa...

item.title: Kerala Government Launches Probe into Wayanad Mudslide and Halts Tunnel Construction
item.description: The Kerala government has ordered a thorough investigation into the causes of a deadly mudslide in Wayanad district, which claimed at least three lives and left five people missing. The incident occur...

item.title: Stock Market Volatility Rises as Ceasefire Uncertainty Affects Airline Sector
item.description: The stock market experienced significant volatility on July 8, 2026, as concerns over an unstable ceasefire in the Middle East led to a decline in airline stocks. Investors grew wary of potential disr...

item.title: Western Cape's Equine Exports Drive Job Creation and Economic Growth
item.description: The equine export industry in the Western Cape is experiencing significant growth, contributing to job creation, rural development, and economic expansion. MEC Ivan Meyer highlighted that the recent e...

item.title: Telstra Outage Highlights Need for Network Redundancy
item.description: The article discusses the 2026 Telstra outage, highlighting its impact on daily life and the broader implications for telecommunications infrastructure. Author Jenna Price recounts her personal experi...

item.title: Former Kaduna Governor disputes ICPC claims over court order and medical access
item.description: Former Kaduna State Governor, Nasir El-Rufai, has rejected allegations by the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC) that he violated a court order while in custody...

item.title: Study Highlights Impact of Social Media Influencers on Tanzanian Gen Z Investment Decisions
item.description: A recent study by researchers from the University of Dodoma (UDOM) reveals that social media influencers, or 'finfluencers', are significantly shaping how young people in Tanzania approach investing. ...

item.title: Accuser Faces Consequences After Public Sexual Assault Allegations
item.description: Patti Davis, author of 'Dear Mom and Dad: A Letter About Family, Memory, and the America We Once Knew,' reflects on the personal and public consequences of revealing sexual assault allegations. In 201...

item.title: A Swashbuckling Pirate Epic: The Resynced Legacy of Assassin’s Creed Black Flag
item.description: The remake of Assassin’s Creed IV: Black Flag, now titled Black Flag Resynced, reimagines the 2013 game as a refined pirate adventure. While the original faced criticism for its stealth mechanics, the...

item.title: Senior Police Officer Allegedly Throws Girlfriend from 6th Floor, Leaves Her Paralysed
item.description: A senior police officer, Agnes Mudigani Ndanu, is accused of pushing her girlfriend Nicole Mondi from the sixth floor of a Thome Estate apartment in Nairobi after a drunken argument over infidelity. N...

item.title: Judge Approves Elon Musk's $1.5M SEC Settlement Despite Concerns
item.description: A U.S. District Judge has approved a $1.5 million penalty against Elon Musk to settle an SEC lawsuit over his handling of the Twitter takeover. The settlement, which requires a trust in Musk’s name to...

item.title: Venezuela's Earthquake Victims Struggle with Water Shortages and Sanitation Challenges
item.description: Thousands of Venezuelans affected by devastating earthquakes in June 2026 face severe water shortages and sanitation crises. In La Guaira, families are using beaches for showers and makeshift solution...

item.title: Judge Blocks Release of Video Evidence in Abbotsford Double Murder Trial
item.description: A British Columbia judge has denied a request to release video evidence from the 2022 Abbotsford double murder trial, despite the victim's family urging transparency. The video, which shows suspects a...

item.title: NATO Commits €70 Billion in Aid to Ukraine Amid Russia's Strong Criticism
item.description: The article discusses the NATO summit in Turkey where member nations pledged €70 billion in military aid to Ukraine for 2026, reaffirming their commitment to collective defense under Article 5. Russia...

item.title: News Corp Australia Blocks Bot Access with Instructions for Users
item.description: The article details a message from News Corp Australia regarding bot detection on their websites. The company uses software to manage crawler traffic, and users experiencing access issues are advised ...

item.title: Government Allocates Rs2bn for HIV-Affected Children's Treatment and Disciplinary Actions
item.description: The Sindh Employees’ Social Security Institution (SESSI) has allocated Rs2 billion to establish an endowment fund for the long-term medical treatment and welfare of 78 children infected with HIV/AIDS ...
